svg.text: Contextual Parallelism · 两阶段通信保证压缩正确性
Challenge: 每 rank 持 s tokens, 压缩需要 m (或 m') 个连续 token, 边界可能跨 rank
• 训练样本打包多序列 → 每条独立压缩, 尾部<m 被丢弃 → 各 rank 的压缩 KV 长度 < s/m 且不一致
• 某个压缩窗口可能横跨 rank i 和 rank i+1 → 必须跨 rank 传输原始 KV 才能正确压缩
Stage 1 · boundary shipment
rank i → rank i+1 : last m uncompressed KV entries
payload : [m, 576] bf16 + positions [m] int64
rank i+1 compresses {received m + local s} → s/m + 1 entries
→ fixed length output (padding at tail)
Stage 2 · all-gather across CP ranks
all ranks exchange their (s/m + 1) compressed entries
fused select-and-pad operator rearranges into
final compressed KV of length cp_size · s/m (padding at tail)
→ every rank now has full global compressed KV view
Visibility rules (per query token)
• HCA + CSA-indexer: visible compressed-entry range is precomputed from rule (block_id ≤ floor(t/m))
• CSA sparse attention: top-k selector output gives explicit indices to attend
• SWA: local n_win window, read from rank-local uncompressed buffer
memory: stage-2 all-gather is only O(cp_size · s/m) — compressed payload keeps comm budget small at 1 M
compared to Ring/Striped attention at length s, comm cost drops by another factor of m = 4 (CSA) / 128 (HCA)
